# Adjacent SSOT Contracts

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/lockingdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Locking / Lease SSOT](../locking.md)

| adjacent context | received / supplied |
| --- | --- |
| C5 Runtime Scheduling | receives selected RuntimeID/CapabilityFingerprint and lease expiry meaning; supplies local claim primitive and fencing token |
| C1 Task Lifecycle | receives Queued -> Claimed and other state transitions; supplies single-writer critical section before saving transitions |
| C4 Provider Runtime | receives the fact that provider process start was fenced to a single runtime |
| C8 Validation | shares the boundary that validation commands run as separate guarded mutations after provider lease release |
